productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Endurance Brown Shoe
description: A perfect shoe for those casual runs and marathoners, the nike Air Endurance is replete with style and comfort. Team this with performance clothes when burning the trail, and with jeans and tees for that semi-formal look on casual Fridays at work.Upper Durable synthetic leather upper with perforations on the forefoot and heel for ventilation Folded detailing on the midfoot to enhance durability and midfoot support nike swoosh overlays appliqued on the sides for enhanced midfoot support and added shoe structure Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Meshed and padded tongue and collar for a snug fit and breathability Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning and impact protection Air unit in the heel for maximum cushioning and protection of the foot during heel-strike Padded footbed for all-day in-step comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Outsole Durable rubber outsole with an arched midfoot for ergonomic comfort Circular suction grooves through the forefoot and heel for maximum cushioning Square lugs lugs on the arched midfoot for supportive grip and traction Triangular lug on lateral forefoot for stability Flex grooves on forefoot for easy, flexible movement Shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
